Game: Kyuuyaku Megami Tensei- Megami Tensei I ·II 1995-03-31T00:00:00-07:00 Kyūyaku Megami Tensei: Megami Tensei I - II consists of Megami Tensei and Megami Tensei II being updated and ported to the Super Famicom. It was released only in Japan in 1995 after Shin Megami Tensei: if... and on the heels of Majin Tensei II: Spiral Nemesis. However Atlus did not take too many liberties with the original gameplay. A few portions of the dungeons of the first game were redone, along with a new save game and teleportation terminal feature which previously did not exist. The graphics and music were enhanced to match the capabilities of the Super Famicom. 1 r5P395YljQ4 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/347eb369-bd8a-490b-94be-0881b39699d3.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/ec4a3a53-c1da-49c3-a197-4928c67176ab.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/aaed62a3-c5aa-4560-9a69-bb1a057e31d5.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/71d06623-56e9-4a95-90c7-b3ea3d8ceb58.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/1f36794c-c0a7-46c9-9bf6-63f78e8c7a1f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/31724a5c-0e19-49d6-ba6a-0e87c294c2e3.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/2728e490-ee6f-4ff8-8d42-1d6385256d8d.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/a2725151-a320-4d05-b79b-4814df2ddd2a.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/26bcb795-3e72-4066-9a38-7570a56d7b79.jpg 5 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Digital_Devil_Story:_Megami_Tensei#Release Not Rated Role-Playing Atlus Atlus
